welcome.title: How do you want to start?
welcome.description: Choose your path: start on your own or submit a request and we will help set up your menu and QR code.
welcome.selfDesc: First create an account, then upload your current menu and start the AI parsing.
welcome.helpDesc: Submit a request, and a manager will help you transfer the menu and prepare a ready-to-use QR code.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Glad to see you again. Enter your details to log in to your account
login.footerLegal: By continuing, you confirm consent to the terms of service and data processing policy.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Enter registration details, it takes less than a minute
register.name: Your name
register.footerLegal: After registering, you can immediately proceed to uploading your first menu and venue details.
register.errAgreeRequired: You must agree to the terms of use and privacy policy
register.errNameShort: Name must be at least 2 characters long
register.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long

helpForm.title: Request for menu transfer
helpForm.subtitle: Leave your details, a manager will contact you and prepare the menu
helpForm.errInvalidFormat: Only PDF files and images are supported
helpForm.uploadLater: I will upload the menu later
helpForm.menuHandledByManager: You do not need to attach the menu at this stage. After you submit the request, a manager will contact you and separately ask for the materials needed for the transfer.
helpForm.legalNote: * WhatsApp is a messenger owned by Meta, recognized as an extremist organization whose activity is banned in the RF.

uploadPage.profileSubtitle: Enter basic information about your venue so we can link the menu to your account.

menuImport.introDescription: Upload PDF, photos or paste a direct link. Our artificial intelligence will automatically recognize categories, dishes, prices, and descriptions.
menuImport.successDescription: Artificial intelligence successfully recognized all dishes, prices, and categories. The draft is saved in your dashboard and ready for editing.
menuImport.statusUploadingDesc: Securely saving files and preparing them for AI recognition.
menuImport.statusProcessingDesc: Artificial intelligence is reading text, finding dishes, prices, and grouping them by category.
menuImport.bgStatusRunning: Scanning menu. The page will refresh automatically once the recognition completes.
menuImport.bgWarningNote: Recognition runs in the background on the server. Closing this tab will not interrupt the process.
menuImport.longRunningDesc: We are processing large files. You can safely go back to the dashboard — the draft will appear there automatically once finished.

results.successNote: AI completed the recognition process! Your menu draft is saved and ready to be opened in the editor.
results.fallbackWarning: The menu has been created using a standard template for your convenience.

errors.invalidFormat: Only PDF files and images are supported
errors.addFile: Please add at least one PDF or photo of your menu.
errors.addLink: Specify a direct link to the menu PDF to send it for processing.
errors.failedToSubmit: Failed to submit menu for recognition. Please try again.
errors.failedToGetStatus: Failed to update progress status. Please try again.
errors.noResult: Import finished with no menu results.
errors.timeoutMessage: The AI took too long to process the menu. Please try again.
errors.generalMessage: We were unable to process the files. Please ensure they contain readable text.
errors.action1: Check that the PDF or photos are clear, not blurred, cropped, or rotated.
errors.action2: If the menu is large, try uploading it in parts: e.g. food and bar separately.
errors.action3: Try uploading a smaller PDF or specifying a direct link to a PDF file.
errors.action4: If the problem persists, please contact support and send us your menu file.

menuSource.linkPlaceholder: Direct link to menu PDF file

dashboard.subtitle: Track public menu views and unique visitors for the venue.

chart.title: Views Dynamics
chart.subtitle: Comparison of menu views and unique visitors

openPublic.title: Open Public Menu
openPublic.description: Check how guests see the menu

menuList.title: Your Menu
menuList.subtitle: Add categories and items, update prices and stop list

header.title: Create Menu
header.description: Create a digital menu in seconds using artificial intelligence. Simply upload files or specify a link.

flow.introTitle: Import Your Menu in a Few Clicks
flow.introDescription: We support PDF files, paper menu photos, and direct links to a PDF. The AI will scan the text, group dishes by category, and create your digital menu.
flow.successDescription: Artificial intelligence processed your files, divided dishes into categories, and populated the prices. It is now ready for editing.

whatItDoes.title: How does the import work?
whatItDoes.subtitle: Leveraging AI to automate menu creation.
whatItDoes.item1: You upload files or paste a link to your current menu.
whatItDoes.item2: Artificial intelligence scans the text and recognizes dish details.
whatItDoes.item3: The system groups positions automatically (appetizers, soups, mains, drinks).
whatItDoes.item4: A digital menu draft is created, ready for you to preview and edit immediately.

nextStage.title: Useful Tip
nextStage.subtitle: How to get the best results?
nextStage.description: Ensure that photos or PDF documents are clear, not blurred, and not cut off. If you have a large menu, try uploading it in parts (e.g. food and bar separately) for maximum accuracy.

errors.unavailableSubtitle: Failed to open menu via this link.

translationModal.title: Menu Translations
translationModal.defaultLangHelp: This is the default language of your menu. All original item names, descriptions, categories, and price options are set in this language. Automatic AI translations are generated based on these texts.
translationModal.statusTranslated: Translation for this language was successfully generated by AI. You can select this language in the editor for manual corrections or update the AI translation.
translationModal.statusNotTranslated: Translation to this language has not been created yet. Guests will see the menu in the default language ({{lang}}) unless you add a translation.
translationModal.translatePrompt: You can generate a translation of the entire menu using AI in just one click. AI will translate categories, item names, descriptions, and measurement units.
translationModal.alreadyActive: Editor is set to this language

delete.confirmText: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
delete.categoryWarning: All related dishes will also be deleted.

menuEditor.noItems: No items in this category yet

itemModal.subtitle: Changes will apply after saving.
itemModal.availableInMenuDesc: Turn off if item is out of stock (Stop list)

venues.title: Venues
venues.subtitle: Select a venue to open its profile, Wi-Fi, and menu layout.
venues.pageSubtitle: Manage venue profile, guest Wi-Fi, and menu layout.
venues.loadingProfileDesc: Loading venue profile, Wi-Fi, and public link.

wifi.title: Guest Wi-Fi
wifi.subtitle: Data will be displayed in the menu for quick guest connection
wifi.hint: When this feature is enabled, a 'Connect to Wi-Fi' button will appear in your digital menu. Guests won't have to enter the password manually — everything happens automatically.

design.title: Menu Appearance
design.templateDesc: Choose the baseline visual presentation for the menu.
design.colorDesc: Used for buttons, active states, and links.
design.logoUploadDesc: Recommended size 512x512px, PNG or SVG format
design.previewTitle: See how guests view the menu

qr.title: QR & Public Link
qr.subtitle: A single primary QR code is used for the venue, pointing to the guests' public menu.

manager.title: QR Code Management
manager.subtitle: Customize the QR code appearance to match your venue's style and download it in high resolution for table tents or stickers.

design.title: Code Design
design.subtitle: Customize the pattern shape, color, and logo in the center.
design.logoHint: It will appear in the center of the QR code.

frame.title: Frame & Text
frame.subtitle: Add a brief call to action and a frame color for the printed QR version.
frame.hint: Keep it short: 1-3 words read best on a table sticker.

directLink.title: Direct menu link
directLink.ariaOpen: Open menu in a new tab

navigation.supportDesc: Write to our manager, we are always here to help.

profile.title: Owner Profile
profile.subtitle: Contact info for login, notifications, and support.
profile.name: First and Last Name

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Select which emails and system notifications you would like to receive.

password.title: Password
password.externalLogin: You log in via {{provider}}. Changing password is not available.
password.updateHint: Update password to log in to your account.
password.warningExternal: Changing password is not available because this account uses sign-in via {{provider}}.

billing.trialBannerText: You have an active free trial of the {{planName}} plan until {{date}}.
billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Plan, auto-renewal, and transaction history for your account.

unitpay.title: UnitPay
unitpay.description: Card binding and subsequent charges are managed via UnitPay.

history.title: Payment History
history.description: Recent transactions and manual status synchronization.

subscription.checkoutErrorUnitpay: Failed to launch payment session. Please try again later or contact support.
subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: Select a plan that will apply to your entire account and all your venues.

howItWorks.title: Secure Payments
howItWorks.description: Payment is processed via a certified provider. All transactions are securely protected by SSL encryption and comply with PCI DSS international security standards.
howItWorks.warning: The subscription renews automatically every 30 days. You can change your plan or cancel the auto-renewal at any time without any fees in your dashboard settings.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.agreeOffer: I agree to the terms of the
checkout.agreeRecurring: I agree to automatic recurring charges of {{price}} once a month for the subscription
checkout.securePaymentNotice: Secure SSL Connection · PCI DSS compliant

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage venue information and menu settings

features.1: Menu and QR code design customization
